mnemonics: PILO-Q: Push-In, Last-Out, Queue: First-In, First-Out
keyPoints: Understand the core operations (insert, delete, search) for each data structure.
Know the time complexity (Big O notation) for each operation on each data structure.
Be able to compare and contrast structures (e.g., Array vs. Linked List, Stack vs. Queue).
commonMistakes: Confusing the operation principles of stacks (LIFO) and queues (FIFO).
Using the wrong time complexity for an operation (e.g., thinking searching a linked list is O(1)).
Forgetting to account for edge cases like an empty list or a full stack/queue.
